fields.headingSection: Comprehensive Security Management in a Unified Experience
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
Pathfinder empowers your organization with a holistic view of your security posture, enabling efficient management of privileged access, endpoint protection, and identity threat detection and response across your entire ecosystem.

The unified Pathfinder platform introduces advanced, unmatched—and otherwise unavailable—technical capabilities.

fields.heading: Holistic Visualization of Paths to Privilege™
fields.body:
True Privilege Graph provides visual privilege mapping, allowing full, context-rich visibility of human, machine and workload identity, entitlement, and privilege escalation path across cloud and hybrid environments in a continuous cycle.

The resulting living map enables customers to see exactly where privileges are granted, giving them the ability to measure the true impact of security risks continuously and quickly address security concerns and gaps, while adhering to least privilege principals.

fields.heading: AI-Powered Adaptive Security
fields.body:
Pragmatic AI reveals anomalies, risks, and threat patterns rooted in meaningful recommendations and accurate detections, allowing organizations to automatically assess privileged access risks in real-time and adjust security policies—eliminating static vulnerabilities.

Having a unified platform like Pathfinder allows customers to holistically leverage the power of AI and Adaptive Security across their entire identity estate, breaking the mold of siloed/distributed systems and applications that focus on individual risks.

fields.heading: Feature-rich, Integrated Identity Security
fields.body: Pathfinder builds on and enhances the capabilities of BeyondTrust’s entire suite of PAM and identity security products in a holistic approach to Identity Security. Once organizations have holistic visibility of their entire identity fabric and the ability to continuously assess risks and attack pathways, Pathfinder leverages its AI-powered adaptive security and the combined capabilities of other integrated products (including the BT suite) to offer organizations a unified, one-stop shop where they can not only identify priorities, but also directly address the visible risks found from one interface.

fields.headingSection: Make BeyondTrust Solutions Even More Powerful with Pathfinder

fields.heading: Your Identities Are Talking. Are You Listening?
fields.body:
You can’t secure what you can’t see. Shadow identities, excessive entitlements, and privileged access blind spots create security gaps that attackers exploit. Without full visibility across human and non-human identities, threats go undetected until it’s too late.

Identity Security Insights cuts through the noise, correlating data from BeyondTrust and third-party solutions to provide a single, unified view of all identities, accounts, and privileged access. By detecting anomalous activity and compromised credentials in real time, you can proactively respond to threats—before they escalate. Plus, with built-in risk ratings and actionable recommendations, you can continuously reduce exposure and strengthen security posture.

fields.heading: Manual Access Approvals Are Slowing You Down. Entitle Speeds You Up
fields.body:
Cloud permissions are a ticking time bomb when left unchecked. Overprivileged users, excessive entitlements, and manual access approvals create security gaps attackers love to exploit. Meanwhile, IT teams are drowning in permission requests, slowing down productivity.

Entitle automates cloud permissions management, cutting through complexity with just-in-time access controls that minimize risk—without creating IT bottlenecks. Empower users with self-service access requests, permission bundling, and 100+ integrations to eliminate manual approval chaos.

The result? A smaller attack surface, a lighter IT workload, and secure, hassle-free access that keeps business moving—without compromise.

fields.heading: Privileged Access From Anywhere—Without the Risk
fields.body:
Remote access is a security nightmare when privileged credentials are involved. VPNs are clunky, contractors and vendors introduce risk, and uncontrolled remote sessions create invisible backdoors for attackers. How do you enable seamless access without exposing critical assets to threats?

Privileged Remote Access gives IT teams full control, visibility, and security over remote privileged sessions—without the complexity or risk of VPNs. Securely connect employees, contractors, and vendors to critical systems from anywhere, while enforcing least privilege access at every step.

Lock down unauthorized network traffic, limit privileged access to cloud assets, and monitor every session in real time—with the power to pause or terminate suspicious activity instantly. Plus, with a tamper-proof audit trail, compliance isn’t just a checkbox—it’s built in.

Because secure remote access shouldn’t mean losing control.

fields.heading: Privileged Credentials Are a Hacker’s Best Friend. Lock Them Down
fields.body:
Privileged credentials are the ultimate prize for attackers—and the biggest risk for businesses. Without centralized control, unmanaged credentials, overprivileged accounts, and hardcoded secrets create a playground for breaches, insider threats, and compliance failures. How do you secure what you can’t see?

Password Safe eliminates credential chaos by combining privileged password and session management in one seamless solution. Automatically discover, vault, and manage every privileged credential, from cloud admin accounts to DevOps secrets and SSH keys. Enforce just-in-time access with adaptive controls, ensuring users only have privileges when they need them.

Monitor and record privileged sessions in real-time, pausing or terminating suspicious activity before it escalates. Plus, with a fully searchable audit trail, you’ll meet compliance requirements with zero guesswork—because control over credentials means control over security.

fields.heading: Least Privilege Without Lost Productivity
fields.body:
Excessive endpoint privileges are an open invitation to cyber threats. One bad click, one exploited application, or one overprivileged user is all it takes for attackers to execute malware, ransomware, or unauthorized changes. Yet, locking down privileges completely frustrates users and kills productivity.

Endpoint Privilege Management delivers true least privilege security—without breaking workflows. Grant the right privilege to the right application, not the user, only when needed, ensuring users stay productive while threats stay out.

Stop attackers in their tracks with industry-leading application control, allow-lists, and prebuilt policy templates that instantly block bad scripts, infected email attachments, and unauthorized executables. Extend beyond sudo limitations on Linux with centralized session management, file integrity monitoring, and real-time oversight.

Because endpoints shouldn’t be the weakest link—they should be your first line of defense.
